Get language names

Source: R/wikipedia_get_language_names.R
wikipedia_get_language_names.Rd

This function sends a GET request to the Wikipedia API and returns the language names as a dataframe.

Usage

wikipedia_get_language_names()

Value

A dataframe of language names.

Examples

# Get language names
wikipedia_get_language_names()
#>          language_tag                                       name
#> 1                  aa                                       Afar
#> 2                 aae                                   Arbëresh
#> 3                  ab                                  Abkhazian
#> 4                 abe                            Western Abenaki
#> 5                 abq                                      Abaza
#> 6            abq-latn                                      Abaza
#> 7                 abr                                      Abron
#> 8                 abs                             Ambonese Malay
#> 9                 ace                                   Acehnese
#> 10                acf                        Saint Lucian Creole
#> 11                ach                                      Acoli
#> 12                acm                               Iraqi Arabic
#> 13                ada                                    Adangme
#> 14                adg                              Andegerebinha
#> 15                ady                                     Adyghe
#> 16           ady-cyrl                   Adyghe (Cyrillic script)
#> 17                 ae                                    Avestan
#> 18                aeb                            Tunisian Arabic
#> 19           aeb-arab            Tunisian Arabic (Arabic script)
#> 20           aeb-latn             Tunisian Arabic (Latin script)
#> 21                aec                              Saʽidi Arabic
#> 22                aee                           Northeast Pashai
#> 23                aer                           Eastern Arrernte
#> 24                 af                                  Afrikaans
#> 25                afh                                   Afrihili
#> 26                agq                                      Aghem
#> 27                ahr                                    Ahirani
#> 28                aig       Antiguan and Barbudan Creole English
